content.title: WAKE UP
core: I wake up at seven o'clock.
content.reading: Good morning! I wake up at seven o'clock. I stretch and yawn in bed. My head is on the pillow, and the blanket keeps me warm. The alarm clock and lamp are on the nightstand beside my bed.

content.title: SUPERMARKET
content.reading: I go to the supermarket with my family. We buy fruit, vegetables, and milk. We pay at the checkout and take the groceries home.

content.title: HOSPITAL
content.reading: I have a cough and a fever. My mom takes me to the hospital. The doctor checks me, and the nurse helps me. I take medicine and rest in bed.

content.title: POST OFFICE
content.reading: I go to the post office with my mom. We buy a stamp, mail a letter, and track a package online.

content.title: BANK
core: I save money at the bank.
content.reading: We take a number and wait. We deposit money into our account, withdraw cash, and check our balance.

content.title: POLICE STATION
content.reading: We talk to a police officer. Police officers protect our community and help people in an emergency.

content.title: FIRE STATION
content.reading: Firefighters drive the fire truck, use a hose and ladder, and help people in danger.

content.title: LIBRARY
core: I like reading books at the library.
content.reading: I get a library card, look for books on the shelf, borrow storybooks, and return them on time.

content.title: PARK
content.reading: I go to the park with my family. We walk, play, sit on a bench, and enjoy nature.

content.title: BUS STATION
core: I take the bus to school.
content.reading: I check the schedule, wait in line, get on the bus, and sit in my seat.

content.title: RESTAURANT
core: What would you like to eat?
content.reading: We look at the menu, order food and drinks, enjoy our meal, and pay the bill.

content.title: BAKERY
content.reading: We see many kinds of bread and cakes. We buy a cake and enjoy our treats.

content.title: PHARMACY
content.reading: The pharmacist asks how I feel and tells me how to take the medicine.

content.title: BOOKSTORE
content.reading: I find a storybook, look at a magazine, and buy a dictionary.

content.title: CLOTHING STORE
content.reading: I try on a jacket. It fits me well. We choose clothes and pay at the checkout.

content.title: TOY STORE
core: Playing with toys is so much fun!
content.reading: We choose our favorite toys and cannot wait to play with them.

content.title: MOVIE THEATER
core: I want to watch a movie.
content.reading: We buy tickets, find our seats, watch the movie, and have a great time.

content.title: MUSEUM
content.reading: We see dinosaur skeletons, paintings, and sculptures. We listen to the guide and take photos without flash.

content.title: ZOO
content.reading: We see many different animals. We follow the rules and do not feed the animals.

content.title: COMMUNITY HELPERS
content.reading: Community helpers make our lives safer, healthier, and better.

content.title: CAR
content.reading: A car has four wheels, doors, seats, and an engine. Always wear your seat belt.

content.title: BUS
core: I take the bus to school.
content.reading: I wait at the bus stop, pay the fare, get on the bus, and ride safely.

content.title: BICYCLE
core: Riding a bicycle is healthy and good for the environment.
content.reading: I wear a helmet, use the bike lane, ring the bell, and check my brakes.

content.title: TRAIN
core: I take the train to the city.
content.reading: I buy a ticket, check the schedule, wait on the platform, and enjoy the ride.

content.title: AIRPLANE
content.reading: I check in, go through security, board the airplane, and put my luggage in the overhead bin.

content.title: TAXI
content.reading: I hail a taxi, tell the driver my destination, pay the fare, and ask for a receipt.

content.title: MOTORCYCLE
core: I ride a motorcycle with an adult.
content.reading: We both wear helmets, sit safely, and follow traffic rules.

content.title: SUBWAY
content.reading: I buy a ticket, go through the turnstile, wait on the platform, and transfer if needed.

content.title: BOAT
content.reading: I wear a life jacket, get on the boat, enjoy the view, and listen to the captain.

content.title: TRANSPORTATION REVIEW
core: There are many ways to travel.
content.reading: We can travel by land, air, or water. Each type of transportation has a different use.

content.title: TRAFFIC LIGHT
content.reading: Red means stop. Yellow means wait and prepare to stop. Green means look and go safely.

content.title: CROSSWALK
core: I cross the street at the crosswalk.
content.reading: Stop at the curb, look left and right, wait for the walk signal, and cross safely.

content.title: ROAD SIGNS
content.reading: Road signs give us information and help keep people safe.

content.title: GOING TO SCHOOL
content.reading: I get up, eat breakfast, go to the bus stop, have classes, and go home.

content.title: AT SCHOOL
content.reading: I learn many things, read books, play with friends, and do my homework after school.

content.title: FAMILY TRIP
core: We are on a family trip.
content.reading: We pack our bags, travel to our destination, go sightseeing, take photos, and buy souvenirs.

content.title: AT THE AIRPORT
content.reading: We check in, get our boarding passes, go through security, board the plane, and collect our luggage.

content.title: CLASSROOM
content.reading: My teacher writes on the whiteboard. I read, write, listen, and answer questions.

content.title: TRANSPORTATION PROJECT
core: We are working on a transportation project.
content.reading: We research transportation, make a poster, write a report, and present it to the class.

content.title: USING PUBLIC TRANSPORTATION
core: I take the bus or MRT to school.
content.reading: I plan my trip, pay the fare, get on, listen for my stop, and transfer if needed.

content.title: WEATHER
content.reading: We use words such as sunny, cloudy, rainy, windy, hot, and cold to describe the weather.

content.title: SEASONS
content.reading: There are four seasons in a year. Each season has different weather and activities.

content.title: MOUNTAINS
core: What do you like about mountains?
content.reading: We hike on trails, enjoy the view, and protect the mountains by taking our trash with us.

content.title: THE OCEAN
content.reading: The ocean gives us food, oxygen, and many resources. We must keep it clean.

content.title: CITIES AND TOWNS
core: What do you like about your city?
content.reading: Cities and towns are places where people live, work, learn, and have fun.

content.title: FOREST
content.reading: Forests give us clean air, water, resources, and homes for animals.

content.title: FARM
core: What do you like about farms?
content.reading: Farms grow crops, raise animals, and give us fresh food.

content.title: WILD ANIMALS
content.reading: Wild animals keep nature in balance. We must protect them and their homes.

content.title: PLANTS
content.reading: Plants need sunlight and water. They give us food and oxygen.

content.title: NATURE REVIEW
content.reading: Nature gives us life, food, clean air, water, and beautiful places.

content.title: EARTH
core: Earth gives us life, air, water, and many resources.
content.reading: Earth is our home. It is the third planet from the sun. It has land, oceans, mountains, and forests. It has air for us to breathe and water for us to drink. We must keep Earth clean and protect it for our future.

content.title: CONTINENTS
core: They are Asia, Africa, North America, South America, Antarctica, Europe, and Australia.
content.reading: We live on Earth. Earth has seven continents. Each continent is special. People live, work, and play in many places. We are all part of one world.

content.title: COUNTRIES
core: Countries give us culture, history, and opportunities.
content.reading: There are many countries in the world. Each country has its own people, culture, and beauty. We can learn from each other and be friends. Let’s respect every country.

content.title: CITIES
core: Cities give us jobs, services, culture, and many opportunities.
content.reading: I live in a big city. My city has many tall buildings, parks, schools, and stores. We keep it clean and safe for everyone.

content.title: CULTURES
core: Cultures help us understand each other and make the world a more colorful and peaceful place.
content.reading: The world is full of different cultures. Each culture has its own languages, food, clothes, music, art, and traditions. Let’s be open-minded and respect every culture.

content.title: LANGUAGES
core: I speak Chinese and a little English.
content.reading: I speak Chinese at home. I am learning English at school. I practice listening, speaking, reading, and writing. Languages connect people around the world.

content.title: PROTECT THE EARTH
core: Why do we need to protect the Earth?
We need clean air, clean water, and a healthy environment to live happy and healthy lives.
content.reading: The Earth gives us air to breathe, water to drink, and food to eat. We can all help protect the Earth by making small changes every day.

content.title: RECYCLING
core: Recycling helps save resources, reduce pollution, and keep our Earth clean.
content.reading: Our Earth has many resources, but some of them are limited. Recycling helps save energy and reduce pollution. Small actions can make a big difference.

content.title: MY FUTURE WORLD
core: What kind of future do you want?
I want a clean, safe, and happy future for everyone.
content.reading: The future is full of possibilities. We can make good choices today to create a better tomorrow. Let’s work together to build a world that is safe, healthy, and happy for everyone.

content.title: FINAL REVIEW
core: We have learned many things about our world.
content.reading: Let’s review what we have learned. Knowledge helps us understand the world and make it a better place for everyone. Let’s keep learning and make a difference!
